thought.text: It seems there was an issue with the web_research tool. Let me try a different approach to find the current temperature in Burbank, IL.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "curl -s \"https://api.openweathermap.org/data/2.5/weather?q=Burbank,IL&appid=your_api_key\" | jq '.main.temp'", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Get current temperature in Burbank, IL using OpenWeatherMap API"}
